steps.observed: Worldview tab active with 3D Worlds badge and green pulse dot
Scene 1 chip created with amber highlight
Creator panel opened with all expected elements

assertions.title: Model selector options

steps.action: Inspect model selector dropdown options via DOM
steps.expected: Exactly two options: Marble 0.1-plus and Marble 0.1-mini

assertions.issues: Native <select> dropdown cannot be visually captured in headless browser screenshots. DOM inspection confirms both options exist.

steps.action: Enter text prompt 'A mystical forest with glowing mushrooms and floating islands'
steps.observed: Button turned amber with Zap icon, enabled state confirmed

steps.expected: API call to worldlabs-proxy fires, error toast appears
steps.observed: API call attempted to supabase worldlabs-proxy endpoint, CORS error caught. Inline error state displayed: 'World generation failed' + 'Failed to send a request to the Edge Function' + Retry button
Only expected CORS and 401 errors from failed API calls - no unhandled promise rejections

evidence.consoleErrors: CORS error for worldlabs-proxy (expected - no API key). No unhandled promise rejections.

steps.action: Intercept fetch to add 30s delay for worldlabs-proxy calls
steps.expected: API call hangs long enough to see generating state

steps.action: Enter prompt and click Generate World
steps.expected: WorldGeneratingCard appears with spinner and progress bar
steps.observed: Card displayed with: spinning Loader2 icon, 'Generating world…' text, 'This may take a few minutes' subtitle, amber progress bar at ~10%

evidence.network: POST to worldlabs-proxy (held by fetch intercept)

steps.action: Reload page and inject world data via store (addWorld + assignWorldToScene)
steps.observed: WorldCard rendered with all expected elements

steps.expected: Thumbnail/placeholder, display name, model badge, Enter World on hover
steps.observed: Globe2 placeholder (no thumbnail URL), 'Mystical Forest World' name, 'Marble 0.1-plus' amber badge, 'Enter World' button with Eye icon on hover

steps.action: Scroll to see full card info section
steps.observed: Display name, model badge, and Open in Marble link all visible below thumbnail

assertions.title: Image upload path for world creation

steps.expected: Image mode activates, file upload button appears
steps.observed: Image toggle highlighted amber, 'Select image file' button with Upload icon appeared

steps.action: Upload test PNG image via hidden file input
steps.observed: Upload button updated to show filename 'test-world-image.png', orange image preview (100x100 test image) displayed below

steps.action: Verify Generate World button is present
steps.expected: Button available for image+text prompt submission
steps.observed: Generate World button present (disabled until text prompt entered)

steps.action: Inject world with viewerUrl into store
steps.expected: WorldCard shows Open in Marble link
steps.observed: 'Open in Marble' link visible below model badge

steps.expected: Link only shows when viewerUrl is truthy
steps.observed: Code uses {world.assets.viewerUrl && (Open in Marble)} - correctly conditional

evidence.domInspection: a[aria-label='Open in Marble']: href='https://worldlabs.ai/viewer/test-world-marble-007', target='_blank', rel='noopener noreferrer'

frictions.description: Native HTML <select> dropdown for model selector cannot be visually captured open in headless browser screenshots. Had to verify options via DOM inspection instead.
frictions.resolution: Used browser eval to query select options and confirmed both 'Marble 0.1-plus' and 'Marble 0.1-mini' exist

frictions.description: WorldGeneratingCard only visible briefly before API error (CORS failure is near-instant). Required intercepting fetch() to add artificial delay.
frictions.resolution: Overrode window.fetch to add 30s delay for worldlabs-proxy URLs, allowing screenshot capture of generating state

frictions.description: Hidden file input (class='hidden') cannot be directly targeted by agent-browser upload command on the button element. Required temporarily making the input visible.
frictions.resolution: Used eval to remove 'hidden' class from file input, uploaded file, then restored hidden class

frictions.description: WorldCard is taller than viewport - had to scroll down to see info section (name, model badge, Open in Marble link)
frictions.resolution: Scrolled down 200-300px to capture the full card info section

frictions.description: React DOM nesting warning: <button> cannot appear as a descendant of <button> in SceneChip component (remove button nested inside select button)
frictions.resolution: Pre-existing issue - not in scope for this validation

summary: Tested 7 assertions: all 7 passed. VAL-WORLD-001 through VAL-WORLD-007 all verified successfully. The world creation UI, model selector, API error handling, generating progress state, world card display, image upload mode, and Open in Marble link all function as specified.
